mapper.sql: select relation.id, relation.role_id, role.role_name, relation.permission_id, permission.permission_name, relation.created_at from sys_role_permission relation inner join sys_role role on role.id = relation.role_id inner join sys_permission permission on permission.id = relation.permission_id
mapper.select: select id, role_id, permission_id, created_at from sys_role_permission where id = #{id}
select permission_id from sys_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId} order by permission_id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_at) values (#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, now())

insert into sys_role_permission (role_id, permission_id, created_at) values
(#{roleId}, #{permissionId}, now())
